pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for you
pricing.hero_desc: Choose the plan that fits your needs
pricing.faq_q1: Can I change plans after subscribing?
pricing.faq_a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time.
pricing.faq_a1_full: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and the difference is prorated.
pricing.faq_a2: We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and e-wallets.
pricing.faq_a2_full: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, MasterCard), bank transfers, and e-wallets (MoMo, ZaloPay, VNPay).
pricing.faq_a3: Yes! All plans come with a 14-day free trial.
pricing.faq_a3_full: Yes! All plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
pricing.faq_a4: Absolutely. You can cancel from your account settings. No cancellation fees and you can use until the end of your billing cycle.
pricing.faq_q5: What are credits and how do they work?
pricing.faq_a5: Credits are units for using advanced features like AI automation, batch processing. 1 credit = 1 action. Credits never expire and can be purchased anytime.
pricing.compare_desc: See detailed features of each plan
pricing.cta_desc: Join thousands of users managing devices smartly
pricing.seo_title: CLICKAI Pricing - Plans for every business size
pricing.seo_description: Choose the right CLICKAI plan. 14-day free trial, 24/7 support, upgrade anytime. Transparent pricing, no hidden fees.
pricing.seo_keywords: clickai pricing, pricing, service plans, subscription, automation pricing

Scene 2: A young girl wakes up, stretches and smiles radiantly.

landing.hero_desc: Complete ecosystem for storing scripts, intelligent auto-care support, and building massive resources for your applications.
landing.hero_desc_suffix: recognizes UI and operates like a real person 24/7 on hundreds of devices.
landing.seo_title: CLICKAI - #1 Phone Farm Automation Platform in Vietnam
landing.seo_description: Leading No-Code phone farm automation platform. Drag-and-drop workflow, Vision AI recognizes UI, operates like a real person 24/7. Free 14-day trial.
landing.now_live: Now Live - Start Managing Devices Today
landing.core_modules_desc: Designed for scale. Built for precision. The ultimate toolkit for building app resources.
landing.features_desc: Fully integrated platform to automate every phone farm task with advanced AI technology.

features.device_management_desc: Control hundreds of phones from one dashboard. Real-time monitoring, smart grouping, 24/7 supervision.
features.visual_workflow_desc: Drag and drop to create automation scripts. Record real actions, edit flexibly, reuse workflows.
features.vision_ai_desc: AI recognizes UI, operates precisely like a real person. Smart template matching, no need to know app structure.
features.high_performance_desc: Process millions of actions daily. Optimized resources, stable operation without interruption.
features.smart_scheduling_desc: Create campaigns with flexible schedules. Even load distribution, automatic retry on failure.
features.detailed_analytics_desc: Real-time dashboard with visual charts. Track success rate, analyze performance.

steps.step1_desc: Download the CLICKAI app to your Android phone. Connects automatically via network in seconds.
steps.step2_desc: Record real actions on the device or drag and drop blocks to build automation scripts.
steps.step3_desc: Schedule or run immediately. The system automatically handles errors, retries, and operates continuously.

nuoi_nick.title: Account Farming
nuoi_nick.description: Fully automate the process of farming social media accounts. Natural interactions, flexible scheduling, real user behavior simulation.

test_key.title: Test Key
test_key.description: Bulk test license keys, activation codes on multiple devices simultaneously. Detailed result reports, easy data export.

auto_farm.title: Auto Farm
auto_farm.description: Run automated farming 24/7 without intervention. Vision AI handles popups, captchas, and unexpected situations automatically.

faq.a1: CLICKAI is a No-Code phone farm automation platform. You can drag and drop to create workflows, use Vision AI to recognize UI and operate like a real person 24/7 on hundreds of devices simultaneously.
faq.a2: No. CLICKAI is designed to be completely No-Code. You just need to drag and drop blocks to create workflows or record real actions on your phone.
faq.q3: How many devices does CLICKAI support?
faq.a3: Unlimited. You can manage from 1 to thousands of Android devices from a single dashboard.
faq.a4: Vision AI uses image recognition technology to find and interact with UI elements on the device screen, helping to operate precisely like a real person without needing to know the app structure.
faq.a5: CLICKAI offers a 14-day free trial with full features. After that, you can choose a plan that fits your needs, starting from basic plans at competitive prices.

landing.testimonials_desc: See what our customers say about DeviceHub.
landing.cta_desc: Join thousands of businesses using CLICKAI. Start for free, no credit card required.
landing.hero_subheadline: Harness the power of intelligent agents to streamline repetitive tasks, boost productivity, and unlock new possibilities for your business. No coding required.

features.title: Features
features.hero_description: Comprehensive device management tools designed to streamline your workflow and boost productivity.
features.explore_description: Discover how DeviceHub can transform your device management workflow.
features.built_description: From startups to enterprises, DeviceHub scales with your needs.
features.startups_description: Get up and running quickly with our intuitive interface and free tier.
features.enterprises_description: Enterprise-grade security and compliance with dedicated support.
features.developers_description: Powerful API and webhooks for seamless integration with your tools.
features.cta_description: Start your free trial today and see how DeviceHub can transform your workflow.
features.smart_automation_desc: Intelligent agents that learn and adapt to your workflows. Automate repetitive tasks with AI-powered decision making.
features.multi_platform_desc: Works seamlessly across web browsers, desktop applications, and cloud services. One agent, unlimited possibilities.
features.visual_workflow_desc: Design automation workflows with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface. No coding skills required to get started.
features.secure_reliable_desc: Enterprise-grade security with encrypted connections. Your data stays safe while agents work 24/7.
features.real_time_monitoring_desc: Track every action with detailed logs and analytics. Get instant notifications when tasks complete or need attention.
features.easy_integration_desc: Connect with your favorite tools and services through APIs. Extend functionality with custom plugins and webhooks.
features.section_subtitle: Discover the tools and capabilities that make our automation platform the choice for businesses worldwide.
features.seo_title: CLICKAI Features - Workflow Automation & Device Management
features.seo_description: Discover powerful CLICKAI features: Smart device management, workflow automation, AI Studio, auto-scheduling and realtime analytics.
features.seo_keywords: clickai features, workflow automation, device management, ai studio, automation platform

about.title: About Us
about.hero_desc: CLICKAI helps you automate any task on Android devices intelligently
about.description_p1: In today's fast-paced digital world, businesses need to stay ahead of the competition. Our intelligent agent automation platform empowers you to automate repetitive tasks, streamline workflows, and unlock new levels of productivity.
about.description_p2: Whether you're managing data entry, web scraping, form submissions, or complex multi-step processes, our platform provides the tools you need to build powerful automations without writing a single line of code.
about.save_time_desc: Reduce manual work by up to 80% and focus on what truly matters for your business growth.
about.eliminate_errors_desc: Automated agents follow precise instructions every time, ensuring consistent and accurate results.
about.scale_operations_desc: Handle increased workloads without adding headcount. Your automation grows with your business.
about.operate_247_desc: Your agents never sleep. Tasks run continuously, even outside business hours and on weekends.
about.mission_statement: We believe that everyone deserves access to powerful automation tools. Our mission is to democratize automation technology, making it accessible to businesses of all sizes. No technical expertise required—just results.
about.timeline_2020_desc: DeviceHub was founded with a vision to revolutionize mobile device management.
about.timeline_2022_desc: Successfully raised funding to expand the team and develop the product.
about.timeline_2023_desc: Introduced enterprise features including SSO and advanced security.
about.timeline_2024_desc: Serving customers in over 120 countries worldwide.
about.values_description: The principles that guide every decision and action we take
about.value_customer_desc: Every decision starts with the customer. Their success is our success.
about.value_innovation_desc: We constantly push boundaries to deliver the most advanced solutions.
about.value_integrity_desc: Building trust through transparency, honesty and business ethics.
about.team_description: The talented and passionate team behind DeviceHub
about.cta_description: Join thousands of businesses that trust DeviceHub to manage their device fleet.
about.seo_description: Learn about CLICKAI - our team and mission. Building a digital future, simplifying device management for all businesses since 2020.
about.seo_keywords: about clickai, about us, team, mission, development history

contact.name: Full name

contact.hero_description: Have questions about DeviceHub? Our team is here to help you get started or find answers.
contact.success_message: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you soon.

contact.faq_q1: How quickly will I get a response?
contact.faq_a1: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please call our support line.
contact.faq_a2: Yes! We'd be happy to schedule a personalized demo. Just mention it in your message and we'll reach out to set up a time.
contact.faq_a3: We offer email support for all plans, live chat for Professional and Enterprise plans, and dedicated support for Enterprise customers.
contact.cta_description: Join thousands of businesses already saving time and boosting productivity with our intelligent automation platform. Start your free trial today and experience the future of work.

contact.seo_description: Contact the CLICKAI support team via email, phone or form. 24/7 technical support, automation solution consultation for businesses.
